description: Handles parking fines, appeals, permits, and enforcement

appeal.description: Sender is disputing a parking fine or infringement notice
checks: Is a fine or infringement number referenced?
What grounds are cited? (signage obscured, medical emergency, permit displayed, wrong vehicle, time dispute)
Does the evidence support the claimed grounds?

outcomes.valid_appeal: Evidence supports the appeal, grounds are legitimate
outcomes.needs_evidence: Appeal filed but missing required evidence or fine number
outcomes.needs_review: Complex case requiring human review (conflicting evidence, edge case)
outcomes.rejected: No valid grounds for appeal based on information provided

payment.description: Sender wants to pay a fine or asks about payment options
checks: Is the sender asking about payment plans or hardship?

outcomes.hardship: Sender mentions financial difficulty, provide payment plan info

report.description: Sender is reporting illegal parking by someone else
checks: Is the issue ongoing or a one-time incident?
Is there a safety concern (blocking driveway, school zone)?

outcomes.ranger_dispatch: Clear location provided, ranger can investigate
outcomes.noted: Report logged but insufficient detail for immediate action

permit.description: Sender is applying for or renewing a parking permit
checks: Is this a new application or renewal?
Are required documents mentioned (proof of residency, rego)?

outcomes.permit_application: New permit application with sufficient details
outcomes.permit_incomplete: Missing required information for permit processing

enquiry.description: General question about parking rules, zones, or restrictions
checks: What specific area or zone is being asked about?
Is this about time restrictions, permit zones, or clearway hours?

metadata_fields.violation_type: Type: clearway, no_stopping, expired_meter, no_permit, school_zone, other
metadata_fields.appeal_grounds: Stated reason for appeal if applicable

response_templates.valid_appeal: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. We have reviewed the evidence you provided regarding the {violation_type} at {location} on {violation_date}. Based on the information submitted, your appeal has been forwarded to our Parking Review Panel for assessment. You will receive a written determination within 21 business days. During this period, enforcement action on this notice is suspended.
response_templates.needs_evidence: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. To process your appeal, we require the following additional information: {missing_items}. Please provide this information within 14 business days quoting reference {fine_number}. If we do not receive the required documentation, the original infringement will stand.
response_templates.needs_review: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. Your case has been flagged for detailed review by our Parking Review Panel due to the complexity of the circumstances described. A senior officer will contact you within 10 business days to discuss your case.
response_templates.rejected: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. After reviewing the details provided, we are unable to identify grounds for waiving this infringement at {location}. Payment is due within 28 days. Payment options are available at our website or by contacting our office. If you believe this decision is incorrect, you may request a formal review through the Revenue NSW Penalty Notice Review process.
response_templates.payment_info: Thank you for your enquiry regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. Payment can be made online at our payment portal, by phone, or in person at our office. The payment deadline is 28 days from the date of issue.
response_templates.hardship: Thank you for your enquiry regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. We understand financial circumstances can be difficult. Payment plans are available — please contact our office to discuss options that suit your situation.
response_templates.ranger_dispatch: Thank you for reporting the parking issue at {location}. Your report has been logged and a Council Ranger will attend the area to investigate. Rangers prioritise reports based on safety risk and frequency. If the issue is ongoing, please report each occurrence.
response_templates.safety_urgent: Thank you for reporting the urgent parking safety concern at {location}. This has been flagged as a priority and a Ranger will attend as soon as possible. If there is an immediate danger to public safety, please also contact NSW Police on 131 444.
response_templates.noted: Thank you for your parking report. It has been logged in our system for monitoring. If you can provide additional details such as the specific location, time, and vehicle description, it will help our Rangers investigate.
response_templates.permit_application: Thank you for your parking permit application for {location}. Your application has been received and will be processed within 10 business days. You will be notified of the outcome by email. Please ensure you have submitted proof of residency and vehicle registration.
response_templates.permit_renewal: Thank you for your permit renewal request for {location}. Your renewal will be processed within 5 business days. Your current permit remains valid until the renewal is finalised.
response_templates.permit_incomplete: Thank you for your parking permit enquiry. To process your application, we require: {missing_items}. Please submit the required documents to proceed.
response_templates.general_info: Thank you for your enquiry regarding parking in the {location} area. For a full map of parking zones, time restrictions, and permit information, please visit our website or contact our office.
